coinMult.description: Economy: multiplies coins earned per run. 1 = default. Raise to make the shop faster to buy out, lower to tighten the economy.

scoreMult.description: Multiplies score earned per run (affects leaderboards). 1 = default.

enemyHpMult.description: Difficulty: multiplies enemy HP. 1 = default. >1 = tankier enemies, <1 = squishier.

enemyDensityMult.description: Difficulty: multiplies enemy spawn count / density. 1 = default. >1 = bigger hordes.
